title: vitis vitiginea var. canescens
intro: Vitis vitiginea var. canescens, also known as wild grape or silver leaf grape, is a variety of wild grapevine native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is valued for its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and relieve digestive issues. The health benefits of Vitis vitiginea var. canescens include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the leaves and berries of the vine.
